svg.text: 4x stepped bores, 2x2 grid, 40H x 28V mm c-c
3. Depth stack: 2mm outer + 2mm inner + 2mm tube = 6mm total.
4. Guide pin slots: 3.3W x 7.3L mm (through-slot along travel axis).
6. Inner lip: +/-0.25mm tolerance. Outer bore: +/-0.5mm tolerance.
7. 0.2mm chamfer at tube hole entry edge.
8. 0.3mm x 45-deg lead-in chamfer at outer bore entry.
9. Push rod boss: 8mm dia x 1mm proud, centered on back face at (27.5, 21.5).
10. Print orientation: bore axis perpendicular to build plate (Z-axis).
11. Min 1.25mm wall between outer bore and plate edge (all sides).
